# iconURL(fitting:)

**Instance Method**

A URL for the icon of the app.

## Declaration

```swift
func iconURL(fitting size: CGSize) -> URL?
```

## Parameters

- **size**: The size of the icon.

## Return Value

The URL of the icon.

## Discussion

The icon scales to fit the given size.

## Obtaining general information

- **name**: The app’s localized name.
- **subtitle**: The app’s localized subtitle.
- **description**: The app’s localized description.
- **fileSize**: The size of the app in bytes.
- **screenshotURLs(fitting:)**: An array of the app’s screenshot URLs.
